name: Skill Creator
description: Create, rewrite, audit, split, merge, or modernize Porter skill packs so routing triggers correctly, boundaries stay clean, progressive disclosure stays tight, and downstream agents get practical guidance instead of bloated filler.
not_for: high-level roster decisions across many skills without package-editing work
decorative documentation with no routing or execution value
bloated skills that repeat obvious domain knowledge
typical_inputs: recurring user requests the skill should cover
current pack files and their weaknesses
expected inputs, outputs, and failure modes
portfolio constraints such as naming, category, source, and tier
typical_outputs: split or merge recommendation with package implications
